default_steps.title: Free Consultation
default_steps.body: We visit your property, listen to your vision, and walk the space together. No pressure, no obligation.

default_steps.title: Custom Design + Quote
default_steps.body: We design a plan around your goals and budget, then send a clear written quote within 24 hours.

default_steps.title: We Build It Right
default_steps.body: Our crew handles everything — site prep, installation, and full cleanup. You get the yard you imagined.

badge_text: Most clients are booked within 48 hours.
badge_subtext: We keep our schedule tight so every project gets full attention.
section_body: Three steps from your first call to a yard you love.
